summary: Iteration 30: Full Multi-Language Support Testing (English, Arabic, Urdu, Hindi) with RTL/LTR switching, language dropdown, and dashboard customization features. All tests passed successfully.

issues: Note: Expense category buttons (Salary, Rent, etc.) on ExpensesPage remain untranslated - hardcoded in English. This is a minor enhancement.

passed_tests: Dropdown shows all 4 languages: EN (English), عر (Arabic), ار (Urdu), हि (Hindi)
English to Arabic: Dashboard title translates to 'لوحة القيادة'
English to Arabic: RTL layout applied (dir='rtl')
English to Arabic: Navigation groups translated (العمليات, المالية, etc.)
English to Urdu: Dashboard title translates to 'ڈیش بورڈ'
English to Urdu: RTL layout applied correctly
English to Hindi: Dashboard title translates to 'डैशबोर्ड'
English to Hindi: LTR layout correctly maintained
Language preference persists in localStorage (ssc_lang key)
POS Page in Arabic: Title shows 'إدخال سريع'
POS Page in Hindi: Title shows 'त्वरित प्रविष्टि'
Expenses Page in Hindi: Title shows 'खर्च', navigation translated
Dashboard Customize Widgets button opens dialog
Widget settings dialog shows toggles for all sections
Widget toggles work correctly (stats, charts, cashBank, etc.)
Theme switching works: Default, Dark, Blue, Green
Theme selection persists in localStorage (dashboard_theme key)
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.js contains comprehensive translations for all 4 languages (EN, AR, UR, HI) with 100+ translation keys
LanguageContext.jsx properly implements language switching with RTL/LTR support via document.documentElement.dir
useLanguage hook is correctly integrated in DashboardLayout, DashboardPage, POSPage, and ExpensesPage
Language dropdown implemented as a proper dropdown menu (not cycle button) using shadcn DropdownMenu component
LANGUAGES array correctly defines RTL=true for Arabic and Urdu, RTL=false for English and Hindi
Dashboard customization dialog provides user-friendly toggle switches for each widget section
Theme system uses localStorage for persistence (dashboard_theme key)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing database data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 complete. Multi-Language Support fully tested: (1) Language dropdown (data-testid=language-dropdown) in sidebar footer provides 4 language options - EN (English), عر (Arabic), ار (Urdu), हि (Hindi). (2) Arabic and Urdu switch to RTL layout, English and Hindi use LTR. (3) Dashboard title, navigation groups, and page titles properly translated in all languages. (4) Language preference persists via localStorage 'ssc_lang' key. (5) Dashboard customization tested: Customize Widgets button opens dialog with toggles for Main Stats, Quick Charts, Cash & Bank, Payment Mode Breakdown, Spending Breakdown, Supplier Dues, VAT Summary. (6) Theme switching works: Default, Dark, Blue, Green options persist via localStorage.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs. All features use real data and localStorage for language/theme persistence.
